\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage[english]{babel}
\usepackage[backend=biber,style=numeric]{biblatex}
\addbibresource{sample.bib}

\begin{document}
\section*{Bibliography Styles Reference}

\subsection*{Numeric}
\printbibliography[heading=none]

\subsection*{Author-Year}
\begingroup
\def\bibsection{\section*{Author-Year}}
\printbibliography[heading=none,style=authoryear]
\endgroup

\subsection*{Vancouver}
\begingroup
\def\bibsection{\section*{Vancouver}}
\printbibliography[heading=none,style=vancouver]
\endgroup

\subsection*{Superscript}
\begingroup
\def\bibsection{\section*{Superscript}}
\printbibliography[heading=none,style=numeric,autocite=superscript]
\endgroup
\end{document}
